epigraph.quote: Simon set up a table & chairs & lights to eat outside, but it started to rain so we ate inside.

moments.quote: Uncle Cottie's old PBY bomber had 14 cylinders around 2 propellers & was 2 x 1200 hp. Simon really liked the lines of the PBY.
We camped behind the 3 Bottles at Great Yeldan, a tilted field in which Simon nearly got the van stuck.
I really liked the Clopton chapel + the alabaster + the rabbit window (see front.) Friendly people weering tweed

images.caption: Stone relief carving, Long Melford church

moments.quote: The village of Lavenham is very, very pretty. Incredible range of houses, many of them tilted.
